summary: A dubious composite (likely hoax) with poor recording fidelity, but the show is noted for a rare Black Peter and an overall decent performance.
review: Fans are divided – some praise the rarity of the Black Peter in the second set and describe the first set as raucous and enjoyable, while others flag the tape as a spliced hoax with mismatched tracks. The recording quality is considered poor and its source uncertain, making the listening experience uneven despite the musical highlights.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about a rare Black Peter give the show decent merit (≈70% weight), but multiple reviewers call the tape a hoax/composite, lowering recording quality (≈30% weight). The mix yields an overall rating around 3.4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers note splices, mismatched song sources and label the tape a hoax; no clear soundboard or audience description provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Standard late‑1977 second set with a rare NFA > Black Peter > NFA sequence; first set described as raucous and the overall show considered average but enjoyable.
